extract: Pumpkaboo (Japanese: バケッチャ Bakeccha) is a dual-type Ghost/Grass Pokémon introduced in Generation VI. It evolves into Gourgeist when traded. Pumpkaboo has four different forms: Small Variety, Medium Variety, Large Variety, and Jumbo Variety. Prior to Pokémon Legends: Z-A, these were instead named Small Size, Average Size, Large Size, and Super Size respectively.
